client_profile.household_profile: Gia dinh 3 the he gom ong ba, bo me va 2 con nho

site_input.site_character: Khu dan cu yen tinh, nhieu cay xanh

space_requests: Phong khach tran cao lien thong san vuon
Bep va ban an nhin ra vuon sau
Phong ngu ong ba o tang 1
Phong lam viec yen tinh cho chu nha
spatial_preferences: Khong gian chung mo va thoang
Luu thong ro giua cong cong va rieng tu
Tang 2 co sinh hoat chung nho cho gia dinh

design_goals: Am ap, sang trong nhung khong phuong truong
Gan ket noi that voi san vuon
must_haves: Mat tien dep va hien dai
Co san vuon va hien ngoai troi de tiep khach
Tang 1 thuan tien cho nguoi lon tuoi
Bep an co view ra cay xanh
must_not_haves: Khong gian noi that toi va bi chia cat
Cau thang chiem trung tam phong khach

business_constraints.approval_goal: Client muon nhin thay khong gian that truoc khi chot concept

presentation_goal.video_priority: Exterior + khong gian cong cong + phong ngu master

reference_images.note: Mat tien co lam che nang, khoang kinh lon nhung van rieng tu
Phong khach mo ra vuon, vat lieu am va nhiu texture tu nhien
Ban dao bep ket hop an uong, view san vuon sau
